title: GM to pause construction of EV battery plant in New Carlisle, officials say
description:

description:

title: Indiana nuclear startup announces $250M agreement with construction manager
description:

description:

title: All-terrain trackchairs stolen from Indiana state park; investigators offering reward
description:
Two all-terrain trackchairs — intended to help disabled Hoosiers enjoy public lands — have been stolen from Fort Harrison State Park in Indianapolis, the Department of Natural Resources said Thursday.

title: Franklin Electric acquires Nebraska-based Wood Bros.
description:
